text:
Once upon an average Tuesday afternoon, Sunny decided that he just could not muster up another cup of coffee. He paced his tiny bedroom, tossing and turning. Surely someone knew something.

"Bella!" he yelled. His cat, known to respond only to his voice, ambled sluggishly across the room to him.

"Suddenly," Sunny began, "I remember!"

"What?" Bella arched her eyebrow.

"The time when... there was a giant peach?"

"Bloody hell, Sunny. Do you have mad dementia?"

"No, no, nothing like that!" Sunny said fervently.

He had a vision! Imagine waking up:

"Wake up. It's peach season! Time for a giant peach snooze party!"

With that, he snuggled into a nest of pillows and blankets, dreaming of orange groves and juicy succulence. He drifted off to sleep, blissfully certain he'd heard it all in one dream.
